zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：当前震荡整理，关注短期支撑
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元价格为2294.13，市场呈现震荡整理状态。价格在24小时内略微下跌0.17%，并未出现明显的上涨或下跌趋势。整体走势处于高点2300.4与低点2292.07之间，短期内缺乏强烈的方向性动能。

技术指标方面，MACD为负值（-10.95），但由于信号线数据缺失，暂时无法做出精准的趋势预测。20日简单移动平均线（SMA）为2301.65，表明价格在该水平附近有一定的压力。RSI未提供，但可以推测当前市场情绪较为平稳，无显著超买或超卖迹象。

支撑位在2292附近，若价格突破该区域，可能进一步测试2290附近的强支撑。阻力位在2300上方，若突破该位置，可能挑战2305至2310区域。投资者可以关注这些价格区间的突破情况，以决定短期交易策略。

建议投资者在当前震荡区间内保持谨慎，可以考虑在支撑位附近轻仓买入，止损设置在2290下方；若突破阻力位，则可逐步加仓，目标设在2310附近。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum's price at $2294.13 shows a slight downward movement over the past 24 hours, reflecting a modest decrease of 0.17%. This suggests a neutral-to-bearish sentiment in the market. The lack of major price fluctuations in the high-low range of $2300.4 to $2292.07 signals that the market is consolidating within a narrow range. With the price near the SMA(20) at $2301.65, Ethereum may continue to hover around this level in the short term as traders wait for more directional clarity.

The absence of an available RSI(14) limits the ability to gauge overbought or oversold conditions, but the current MACD value of -10.95 indicates a bearish short-term momentum. Without a corresponding signal line value, the MACD remains inconclusive, but this negative reading suggests downward pressure. A closer look at the trend shows a lack of strong bullish or bearish signals, indicating the potential for further consolidation or a slight continuation of downward movement if the market sentiment weakens.

Key support is found around the $2292.07 mark, which has held as a local low in the past 24 hours. A breach below this level could open up further downside potential toward the $2270 region. On the upside, resistance lies near the $2300.4 level. Should the price manage to break above this point with increased volume, the next resistance level to watch would be near the $2320 mark, with a possible test of the SMA(50) or higher.

Given the current market conditions and technical indicators, a cautious approach is recommended. If the price holds above the support at $2292, a short-term range trade between $2292 and $2300 could be viable. Traders should also be prepared for a possible breakout or breakdown, watching for confirmation with volume and any potential changes in the MACD or RSI as they become available.
